keyFindings.description: DELETE /workers/:id/workspace test mock missing pipelineCacheFile in forLegion return — this PR added the field to LegionInstancePaths but missed updating this mock. Causes typecheck failure.
Pre-existing from #279 merge: unsubscribeWorkerFromEnvoy (lines 744, 823) doesn't exist — should be unsubscribeAllWorkerTopics. Not caused by this PR but blocks CI.
Line 481 derives pipelineCachePath via path.join(path.dirname(...)) instead of using config.paths.forLegion(legionId).pipelineCacheFile
readPipelineCache at line 257 not wrapped in try/catch — non-ENOENT errors would crash cmdStatus
